Du har lært ferdigheten som lar deg svømme i vann.
English: You have learned the ability to swim in water.

Norwegian: Du har lært ferdigheten som lar deg bevege seg opp og ned fossefall. Trykk  <color=#B593D5>X</color>  for å svømme oppover. Trykk  <color=#B593D5>SHIFT</color>  for å svømme nedover.
English: You have unlocked the ability to swim up and down in water. Press  <color=#B593D5>X</color>  to swim up. Press  <color=#B593D5>SHIFT</color>  to swim down.

Norwegian: Du har lært ferdigheten som lar deg bevege seg opp og ned fossefall. Trykk  <sprite=7>  for å svømme oppover. Trykk  <sprite=8>  for å svømme nedover.
English: You have unlocked the ability to swim up and down in water. Press  <sprite=7>  to swim up. Press  <sprite=8>  to swim down.

Norwegian: Du har lært ferdigheten som lar deg bevege seg opp og ned fossefall. Trykk  <sprite=35>  for å svømme oppover. Trykk  <sprite=36>  for å svømme nedover.
English: You have unlocked the ability to swim up and down in water. Press  <sprite=35>  to swim up. Press  <sprite=36>  to swim down.

Norwegian: Du har lært ferdigheten som lar deg svømme fritt i vann. Svømming i vann koster ikke lengre steg. Det koster 1 steg å svømme opp og ned fossefall.
English: You have learned the ability to swim freely in water. Swimming in water no longer costs any steps. Moving vertically in waterfalls now cost 1 step.

Norwegian: Du har lært ferdigheten som lar deg bore deg opp gjennom blokken over deg (kun gjennom én blokk). Trykk  <color=#B593D5>X</color>  for å bore.
English: You have learned the ability to drill your way up through the block above you (through a single block only). Press  <color=#B593D5>X</color>  to drill up.

Norwegian: Du har lært ferdigheten som lar deg bore deg gjennom en blokk ved siden av deg (kun én blokk). Beveg deg som normalt for å bore deg gjennom.
English: You have learned the ability to drill your way through to the other side of a block next to you (Only a single block). Move as normal to drill your way through.

Norwegian: Du har lært ferdigheten som lar deg skyte en gripekrok mot en blokk i det fjerne (det koster deg fortsatt steg å skyte deg over blokker). Hold <color=#B593D5>F</color> inne for å sikte, og slipp for å gripe.
English: You have learned the ability to grapple towards a block in the distance (using the grappling hook to travel over blocks will still cost the movement of those blocks). Hold  <color=#B593D5>F</color>  to aim, and release it to grapple.
